title: selaginella longistrobilina
intro: Selaginella longistrobilina, also known as the Selaginella plant, is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella longistrobilina include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have been used in various herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
